title: 2017 GST/HST Incremental Federal Rebate for Municipalities Report - Canada.ca
content:
## 2017 GST/HST Incremental Federal Rebate for Municipalities Report
The Goods and Services (GST) and Harmonized Sales Tax (HST) Incremental Federal Rebate for Municipalities Report - January 1 to December 31, 2017, is available for download in the following formats:

## Tables in PDF format
- Newfoundland and Labrador
- Northwest Territories
- Prince Edward Island
For information about PDF formats, see our help files .

## Tables in CSV format
- Newfoundland and Labrador
- Northwest Territories
- Prince Edward Island
- All provinces and territories

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
